name: hardware-index
description: Index of common electronic components with ESP32 MicroPython driver recipes. Each component has a JSON file in this directory with pin requirements, wiring, code example, and pitfalls.

esp32_pinout.description: ESP32 / C3 / S3 GPIO mapping — all pins, functions, restrictions

rgb_led.description: RGB LED (common cathode/anode) — PWM on 3 pins

ws2812.description: WS2812/NeoPixel addressable LED strip — see also api/neopixel.json

oled_ssd1306.description: 0.96" I2C OLED display — requires ssd1306.py in lib/

motor.description: DC motor via L298N/H-bridge — PWM speed + direction pins

pir.description: HC-SR501 PIR motion sensor — simple GPIO input

button.description: Momentary push button — GPIO input with pull-up/down, debounce

sd_card.description: MicroSD card SPI adapter — see api/machine-sdcard.json

auto_expand_note: When a component not yet documented is encountered, add a new JSON file here following the format of led.json/servo.json/motor.json. Then update this index.
